headline_seed: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary - BBC
draft_text:
NYC Mayor Mamdani's endorsed slate swept Tuesday's Democratic primaries. Darializa Avila Chevalier ousted Rep. Adriano Espaillat in NY-13. Brad Lander beat Dan Goldman 65.7%-34.1% in NY-10, per BBC News.

And that's the mews.
